creator: rfg-freebsd@tristatelogic.com
text:
The cups-2.x.x port/package comes with a program called snmp.  It is very useful and is referenced explicitly on the in-built help pages provided by the cupsd daemon's web interface (http://localhost:631)

Unfortunately, there does not seem to be any man page for this program which gets installed along with the cups-2.x.x port/package.
